# The Aroma of Sincere Worship

## Scripture

"Let us draw near with a true heart in full assurance of faith, with our hearts sprinkled clean from an evil conscience and our bodies washed with pure water." - Hebrews 10:22

## Reflection

As we begin our day, we're drawn to the rich aroma of freshly brewed coffee. The process of brewing coffee requires patience and a willingness to let the grounds steep in the liquid, allowing the flavors to extract and meld together. In a similar way, our faith requires us to slow down and let our hearts be washed clean from the stains of our past, allowing the pure waters of God's love to soak in. As we surrender our lives to Him, we become vessels for His goodness to flow through, filling us with the sweetness of His presence. Just as the crema on a well-made latte is a testament to the quality of the coffee, so too does our sincere worship reflect the depth of our faith. As we draw near to God, may our hearts be stirred to worship Him with a true and sincere heart, overflowing with the rich aroma of His presence.

## Prayer

We come before You, Lord, with hearts full of gratitude and humility, seeking to draw near to You with a true and sincere heart. Wash us clean from the stains of our past, and fill us with the pure waters of Your love, that we may be vessels for Your goodness to flow through.

## One-Line Application

As we worship, let our hearts be washed clean, allowing the pure waters of God's love to soak in.
